about.summary: Building end-to-end AI systems: generative AI applications, autonomous agents and orchestration, computer vision, and full-stack prototypes. Primary stacks: Python, FastAPI, React, LangChain/agent frameworks, PyTorch, OpenCV, Docker.

experience.description: Automating high-scale enterprise workflows using multi-agent systems and agentic reasoning. Integrating AI models into full-stack production pipelines.

education.summary: Focusing on the intersection of Full Stack Dev and AI. Developing automated systems that utilize distributed intelligence at scale.

full_stack_ai.description: Developing end-to-end intelligent applications with integrated ML backends and responsive frontends.

applied_ml_automation.description: Automating complex reasoning tasks using modern LLM frameworks and autonomous agentic patterns.

core_intelligence.description: Engineering the neural core of applications through vision, NLP, and advanced predictive modeling.

infrastructure_dev.description: Building the foundation for automation through robust CI/CD, containers, and secure shell workflows.
